mapper.select: SELECT cu.*, cuf.remark, COUNT(cm.id) AS unreadCount FROM chat_user cu INNER JOIN chat_user_friend cuf ON cu.id = cuf.friend_id and cuf.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.chat_id = CASE WHEN #{user.userId} < cu.id THEN CONCAT('user-', #{user.userId}, '-', cu.id) ELSE CONCAT('user-', cu.id, '-', #{user.userId}) END AND cm.send_id != #{user.userId} AND cm.is_read = 0 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cuf.user_id = #{user.userId} AND cu.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY cu.id,cuf.remark
SELECT cu.* FROM chat_user cu JOIN chat_group_member cgm ON cu.id = cgm.user_id and cgm.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cgm.group_id = #{groupId} and cu.is_deleted = 0
